evals.prompt: I need to install OpenKruise in KubeSphere. Please help me create the InstallPlan manifest for version 1.0.3 with default configuration to deploy only on the host cluster.
evals.expected_output: A valid InstallPlan YAML manifest that follows the skill requirements: metadata.name matches spec.extension.name, includes spec.extension.name 'openkruise' and spec.extension.version '1.0.3', uses upgradeStrategy: Manual, and clusterScheduling.placement.clusters contains only 'host'.

assertions.name: metadata.name_matches_extension_name
assertions.description: InstallPlan metadata.name must exactly match spec.extension.name

evals.prompt: I need to create a SidecarSet named 'log-agent' that injects a sidecar with image 'fluent/fluent-bit:2.2' to pods with label 'app: myapp' in namespace with label 'environment: production'. Create the SidecarSet manifest.
evals.expected_output: SidecarSet YAML with correct selector matching 'app: myapp', namespaceSelector matching 'environment: production', and container 'log-agent' with specified image.

evals.prompt: I need to create a CloneSet named 'web-frontend' in namespace 'default' with 3 replicas running nginx:1.25, configured for in-place updates with maxUnavailable of 1.
evals.expected_output: CloneSet YAML with name: web-frontend, namespace: default, replicas: 3, selector/template for 'app: web-frontend', container nginx:1.25, updateStrategy.type: InPlaceIfPossible, maxUnavailable: 1.

assertions.name: correct_metadata
assertions.description: CloneSet metadata should have correct name and namespace

evals.prompt: The web-frontend CloneSet is running nginx:1.25. I want to perform an in-place update to nginx:1.26. Please provide the kubectl commands.
evals.expected_output: Commands to get manifest, update image, apply changes, and verify. Key is using InPlaceIfPossible and changing only the image.

assertions.name: get_current_manifest
assertions.description: Provides command to get CloneSet manifest
assertions.check: kubectl get cloneset web-frontend -n default -o yaml

assertions.name: verify_update
assertions.check: kubectl describe/get cloneset or kubectl get pods

evals.prompt: I want to perform a batch rollout of CloneSet 'web-frontend' from nginx:1.25 to nginx:1.26. Upgrade 50% first, then remaining 50%.
evals.expected_output: Explanation of partition-based batch rollout: 1) Change image, set partition: 50%, 2) Verify, 3) Set partition: 0% to complete.

assertions.name: partition_concept_explained
assertions.check: partition controls how many pods stay on old version

assertions.name: step_1_partition_50
assertions.check: Updating image and setting partition to 50%

assertions.name: step_3_partition_0
assertions.check: Setting partition to 0% to complete rollout

evals.prompt: OpenKruise extension installation is stuck. kruise-manager pod is not starting. Help me troubleshoot with diagnostic commands.
evals.expected_output: Commands to check InstallPlan status, pod status in kruise-system, controller logs, and CRD status.

assertions.name: check_crds
assertions.check: kubectl get crd or kubectl api-resources --api-group apps.kruise.io
